'''zhohayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swampy|swampy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swampy|swampy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhohayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohayithi|zhohayithi]] || [[word:zhohayiji|zhohayiji]] || [[word:zhohayishi|zhohayishi]] || [[word:zhohayiki|zhohayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohayuthuthu|zhohayuthuthu]] || [[word:zhohayujuju|zhohayujuju]] || [[word:zhohayushushu|zhohayushushu]] || [[word:zhohayukuku|zhohayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohayuthu|zhohayuthu]] || [[word:zhohayuju|zhohayuju]] || [[word:zhohayushu|zhohayushu]] || [[word:zhohayuku|zhohayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohayufthuf|zhohayufthuf]] || [[word:zhohayufjuf|zhohayufjuf]] || [[word:zhohayufshuf|zhohayufshuf]] || [[word:zhohayufkuf|zhohayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohayethe|zhohayethe]] || [[word:zhohayeje|zhohayeje]] || [[word:zhohayeshe|zhohayeshe]] || [[word:zhohayeke|zhohayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohayothotho|zhohayothotho]] || [[word:zhohayojojo|zhohayojojo]] || [[word:zhohayoshosho|zhohayoshosho]] || [[word:zhohayokoko|zhohayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohayotho|zhohayotho]] || [[word:zhohayojo|zhohayojo]] || [[word:zhohayosho|zhohayosho]] || [[word:zhohayoko|zhohayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohayofthof|zhohayofthof]] || [[word:zhohayofjof|zhohayofjof]] || [[word:zhohayofshof|zhohayofshof]] || [[word:zhohayofkof|zhohayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfthĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfjĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfshĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfkĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfthĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfjĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfshĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfkĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfthĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfjĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfshĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhohayĂŻfkĂŻf|zhohayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohayĂŠthĂŠ|zhohayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhohayĂŠjĂŠ|zhohayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhohayĂŠshĂŠ|zhohayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhohayĂŠkĂŠ|zhohayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohayathatha|zhohayathatha]] || [[word:zhohayajaja|zhohayajaja]] || [[word:zhohayashasha|zhohayashasha]] || [[word:zhohayakaka|zhohayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohayatha|zhohayatha]] || [[word:zhohayaja|zhohayaja]] || [[word:zhohayasha|zhohayasha]] || [[word:zhohayaka|zhohayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohayafthaf|zhohayafthaf]] || [[word:zhohayafjaf|zhohayafjaf]] || [[word:zhohayafshaf|zhohayafshaf]] || [[word:zhohayafkaf|zhohayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhohayasha|zhohayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhohayshĂ«sha|zhohayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhohayrosha|zhohayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhohaymusha|zhohaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhohayasha|zhohayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhohaynkshĂ«sha|gozhohaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhohaynkrosha|gozhohaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhohaynkmusha|gozhohaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhohaynkyasha|gozhohaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhohahayasha|zhohahayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhohahayshĂ«sha|zhohahayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhohahayrosha|zhohahayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhohahaymusha|zhohahaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhohahayasha|zhohahayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhohahaynkshĂ«sha|gozhohahaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhohahaynkrosha|gozhohahaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhohahaynkmusha|gozhohahaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhohahaynkyasha|gozhohahaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhehĂŠyasha|zhehĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhehĂŠyshĂ«sha|zhehĂŠyshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhehĂŠyrosha|zhehĂŠyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhehĂŠymusha|zhehĂŠymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhehĂŠyasha|zhehĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhehĂŠynkshĂ«sha|gozhehĂŠynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhehĂŠynkrosha|gozhehĂŠynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhehĂŠynkmusha|gozhehĂŠynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhehĂŠynkyasha|gozhehĂŠynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhohfayasha|zhohfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhohfayshĂ«sha|zhohfayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhohfayrosha|zhohfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhohfaymusha|zhohfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhohfayasha|zhohfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhohfaynkshĂ«sha|gozhohfaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhohfaynkrosha|gozhohfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhohfaynkmusha|gozhohfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhohfaynkyasha|gozhohfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
